# SecGuestRef

**Type Alias**

A reference to a guest object, which identifies a particular block of guest code in the context of its code signing host.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias SecGuestRef = UInt32
```

## Discussion

Guest handles are assigned by the host at will, with [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecNoGuest] being reserved as the `NULL` value. They can be reused for new children if desired.
title: SecGuestRef
